_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: Paperless-ngx
description: A document management system that transforms your physical documents into a searchable online archive. Requires Redis and optionally PostgreSQL/MariaDB.
startup:
mkdir -p /home/container/data /home/container/media /home/container/consume /home/container/export

export PAPERLESS_DATA_DIR="/home/container/data"
export PAPERLESS_MEDIA_ROOT="/home/container/media"
export PAPERLESS_CONSUMPTION_DIR="/home/container/consume"
export PAPERLESS_EXPORT_DIR="/home/container/export"
export PAPERLESS_PORT="${SERVER_PORT}"

if [ -z "${PAPERLESS_SECRET_KEY}" ]; then
    echo "Generating random Django secret key..."
    export PAPERLESS_SECRET_KEY=$(tr -dc 'a-z0-9!@#%^&*(-_=+)' < /dev/urandom | head -c 50)
fi

exec /sbin/docker-entrypoint.sh

variables.name: Redis URL
variables.description: Redis instance URL (e.g. redis://127.0.0.1:6379 or redis://:password@127.0.0.1:6379). Required.

variables.name: Database Engine
variables.description: Database engine to use (sqlite, postgres, or mariadb). SQLite is default and needs no extra variables.

variables.name: Database Host
variables.description: Hostname or IP address of the database server.

variables.name: Database Name
variables.description: The name of the database to use.

variables.name: Django Secret Key
variables.description: A random secret key for Django. Leave blank to generate automatically.

variables.name: Paperless URL
variables.description: The URL you will use to access Paperless (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8000 or https://paperless.domain.com). Required for CSRF validation.
